question: What is the total ticket expense of the visitors whose membership level is 1?
gold_sql: SELECT sum(t2.Total_spent) FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id WHERE t1.Level_of_membership  =  1
predicted_sql: SELECT SUM(T2.total_spent) FROM visitor AS T1 JOIN visit AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.visitor_id WHERE T1.level_of_membership = 1;
raw_response: SELECT SUM(T2.total_spent) FROM visitor AS T1 JOIN visit AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.visitor_id WHERE T1.level_of_membership = 1;
